AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.description: I'm a passionate Front-End Developer with 5+ years of experience building modern web applications. I specialize in React, Next.js, and creating delightful user experiences.
AboutPage.description2: My journey in tech started during college when I built my first website. Since then, I've been obsessed with crafting beautiful, performant, and accessible web applications that make a real impact.
